reviews.review_description:
The game looks really good graphically, I wish there was a tutorial on how to load bombs??? Can't find where to put them to shoot shoot.

I really would like a map or something showing me which way to fly?

I got stuck in the asteroids and couldn't move.

In the pause menu all the levels have question marks on the objectives, so it doesn't actually say what you need to do to unlock levels, but I have been moving to different planets anyway? Not sure why another review was saying they couldn't get different levels. 

It's a bit tedious having to repower the batteries to everything tbh. Ik that's supposed to be a charming part of the game.

I hated to dialogue in the beginning, the bot is talking way too long for so little info tbh.

It is however the ONLY first person spaceship flying game that has not caused me any motion sickness at all, so I'll likely keep playing and trying to learn how to load a bomb!..

Edit, you actually don't tell us how to shoot the bomb on purpose? I found the cartridge to print straight away but it's no use if I don't know how to use it.

reviews.review_title: Why can’t I get the other levels
reviews.review_description: I love the game and is very fun but I have one issue… I can’t get to different levels. I have no idea why and there’s tutorial on YouTube. Devs your game is absolutely awsome and I love it just if you could give me a tutorial as a comment that would be awesome!!! Thank you for reading this. I love your game!

developer_response.body:
In the pause menu there's a menu which shows you how to unlock the other levels
Good luck!

reviews.review_description:
I absolutely love this game, and when I notice small creators making games, I immediately jump on ship and start supporting! This game was a LOT better than my expectations stood for it. Most vr games do NOT get space/sci-fi correct, but you nailed it! Pnuminomicroscopicsilicovolcaniconiosis.

P.s, yes I did just put pnuminomicroscopicsilicovolcaniconiosis in case I make it into the video.
give me my money back 😡
Good game but it does get a bit repetitive

reviews.review_title: Incredible fun for the sale price esp!!
reviews.review_description:
I'm early in the game, but so far it's great! Fun to futz with all the cockpit stuff, I feel like a kid getting to play pretend in a Millennium Falcon or something... great voice acting brings character to the experience and feeding your little pet donuts and cake is amusing and whimsical in a way that reminded me of a Tomorrowland attraction in Disneyland! 

There are some confusing bits that make me wish there was a manual of some sort...it would also be rad if you could customize what features you don't want to futz with--I personally would love to not have to keep messing with the heater...I left the door to get items open and that made sense I was letting cold in but now I don't know why it keeps freezing up? A minor complaint for an overall fun ride!

***Edit***
I found the discord! Cold problem solved! 😎
Ziggy

reviews.review_title: Please return to the cosmic express
reviews.review_description: Where is the cosmic express

developer_response.body:
Hey, there should be an element on your HUD on the front of your ship that will inform you where to go. If you don't see it try spinning around
Hope that helps!

reviews.review_description: i finished this game the first day i got it

developer_response.body: Did you do the true ending though 👀

reviews.review_description:
The game is awesome ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

But every time I want to move I have to reset my boundary (when sitting) but when standing you can just turn your body not that hard⭐⭐
I feel after the end it is a little confusing on what to do but I would buy it’s a fun story game also i hate pal 😪🫩🫩

for me inside the ship can a bit repetitive and the story for me is not that engaging and the worst part about the game is that when trying to close the game it is very buggy witch makes it a pain to do so so i just did not play the game and i remembered i had this game so i tried to refund it but it had gone over the two weeks and the first and last time i play it was over two hours

developer_response.body: Hey we're sorry that you had that experience. When you say closing the game is very buggy what particular issues do you mean? Do let us know so we are able to try to fix this, either here or on our socials or developer@stardustcollective.dev

reviews.review_title: 9/10, love this game, get if space fan
reviews.review_description: Amazing game, you get to control a spaceship with ziggy, game controls are intuitive and didn’t feel almost any discomfort playing, only reason it isn’t a five is because the games balancing is off on normal difficulty it is hard to manage everything and pay attention to the story I recommend starting on easy mode and then moving to normal if needed, THE GAMES DESCRIPTION IS PRETTY ACCURATE, CHECK MY BIO FOR DISCOUNT LINK

This is a great game! 
I love everything about it.
The graphics, style, sounds, humour, story and the controls are all spot on!

I love the style of game play too… ship management and shooter.
The idea behind the Ziggy’s is great aswell! I always feel guilty when one dies 😔 lol 

You get a choice to play this with controllers or hand tracking… I played via controllers. Love how you control your ship with the twisting and turning of the controller… more flying games should use this method.

You are sat in your ships cockpit, tasked with keeping batteries charged and inserted into the areas you need power the most.. while at same time feeding the Ziggy’s, printing more Ziggy’s and food ect… and flying and navigating your ship through asteroid fields and in pursuit of enemy ships… or blasting them too.

It all goes together so perfectly.
And the really funny humour tops it off!

I hope they make a second Ziggy game… maybe a coop one, where you are in a 2 seater ship or one player flies, whilst the other player walks about the ship repairing.

Highly recommend this masterpiece of a game!!

Just picked this up today, so an early impression review.
This really feels like a Star Wars spin off.
Sitting in the cockpit is so immersive and getting to grips with all the gadgets and controls is very well explained to you, take your time to look around and take note of your vital equipment.

It feels great to fly around in space, I’m looking forward to really exploring more of ZIGGY’S world.
Great job by the dev.

This is an absolute blast! The mix of space exploration, quirky humor, and hands-on VR interactions makes it incredibly immersive. The visuals are vibrant, the gameplay is engaging, and managing your spaceship is cool. Juggling ship controls while navigating the cosmos keeps the gameplay exciting, and the charming characters add to the fun.

reviews.review_title: The main boss ruined this game
reviews.review_description: The one shot kill and restart from the checkpoint just leaves you with no time to prep before getting one shot killed again. Why would someone do this with a boss, you have to kill the thing 3 times and at the end of you do not kill it the first time, you're screwed.

All right here we go, been waiting for a quest 3 update to arrive and here it is. Improvements all around super stoked and excited to play this game all over again! It looks good and feels great, but most importantly, the loving touches on this update have been well worth the wait. I hope everyone who hasn't picked up this game yet will do so because the time put in to bring it to the best experience has made it all worthwhile. Those playing for the first time, especially on quest 3, are going to love this! Thank you for giving us VR enthusiast what we wanted.

I unfortunately didn't like the concept. The games objective is not always clear enough,  moving in space feels kind of wrong and the tasks in the ship all occure to quickly, you can never rest for a single second. They feel more like chores then actual achievements. Battle is not really satisfying either. They should have focused on one of these things, either make it a more or less pure cockpit managemnt game where you could maybe solve some puzzles, or focus on fighting and managing only the relevant stuff for this. I was excited by the idea of the game, but it didn't meet my expectations. Also closing the game made my whole quest 3 freeze. Pretty big bug.

reviews.review_title: Only 6 stages out of 16 are available
reviews.review_description:
What Dev makes a game where most of the levels are impossibles to reach?  on Easy setting ?   After (at least) a dozen attemp, On easy setting, still can't  get to Ramuraka :(

After finishing the game, you can't stay on the same profile and try other Routes (like in Ghost signal), you have to erase the profile and start again, redo the Tutorial. Reboot the system...  That is a major drag,  

i couldn't skip the first part, where you get the ship, repair the ship, learn blah blah...  One time, i skipped the instructions from AI, since it was my 10th time doing that stupid intro, and it bugged big time.

Edit after the New update:  Seriously.  Devs need to check EASY in the dictionary.  I get to the Empress.  Distroy her main ship.  Destroy her transformer ship.  Then she transforme into a small ship and "your ship was destroyed". For no apparent reason. Bravo for the update. You manager to pass from 2 stars to one

Manager to FINISH the Game in story mode.  Any if you guys actualy tried this game?  Post a youtube video if IT is the case.

This could be a good game but it's unplayable for me as I'm left handed. There seems to be no option to move the thrust lever to the right of the cockpit, unless I'm missing something......

Not good!

developer_response.body:
Hey,
The game should be perfectly playable left or even one-handed. The flight control can be grabbed by either hand, and while the thrust lever is on the left hand side of the cockpit, it isn't necessary to be adjusting your thrust and steering at the same time. It is designed that the thrust control is often set and forget to encourage this option.

We do admit this isn't quite optimal, and we may look into better thrust options in the future

reviews.review_description: I got some money for my birthday and chose to spend it on this game and it was worth it. I remember 3 years ago I saw some videos on TikTok. I followed the series for some months but it ultimately became forgotten. But just a few days ago I found the game in the store and memories came back. I chose to buy the game mostly blind, which can be a risk but this time it worked out and I’ve had a great time with it. I would recommend this to anyone who is considering buying.
This is the Hardest game ever I literally got so mad that I cried and canceled school the next day cuz I was so sad

developer_response.body:
Hey we're sorry that you didn't have a good experience playing the game.  

We have some quite extensive difficulty options,ranging from hard, normal, easy, and story.  Particularly our story mode makes the game significantly easier to play. We recommend choosing your difficulty option if you pay the game in the future. 

We hope you give it another try and can enjoy it more next time!

reviews.review_description: It was a good game for the first half hour, until I got soft locked in the kamney belt (level 2) from invisible and indestructible enemies. I say indestructible because I even tried launching a bomb at the ally ship they were attacking and shot the bomb to detonate it, but I still got the dialogue that I had to chase down the enemy ships. Stardust studio supposedly fixed this issue already, so I don't know why i am having it, but until they message me on how to get past the soft locks, I will not play so i can still get a refund. STARDUST, FIX YOUR GAME!!!

developer_response.body:
Hey we're sorry that you ran into these issues. We recently pushed another update, fixing a number of soft locks,  
We hope you have a better experience next time you play!

reviews.review_description:
A great space game, flying, fighting and with fun controls Ziggy is absolutely adorable and I feel bad draining him sometimes ! 
Multitasking space game filled with laughs and fun 
Check Bio for 25 off
I was thinking it would be an adventure not a flight  simulator

It's alright. Very repetitive. Basically your inside your ship ensuring everything is alright. Not that exciting after a while. I don't do the YouTube thing and pretend to talk to Ziggy when basically I have him as a hostage constantly draining and feeding him to drain him some more.

reviews.review_title: Best vr game I have ever played
reviews.review_description:
This game story is beautifully written. The onomatopoeia is wonderful. Every time you press the button or something it goes like beep bop, but small issue on the second level. If you actually catch the spaceship, scanning you with the boost when you push the throttle all the way forward and you actually catch the scanner pal will keep going like you have to catch him. He’ll he’ll keep doing his little dialogue and he’ll kind of annoying even though like the objective like in the top right of the screen says shoot down the ship if you do it, it sequence brakes that sequence.
Also, can you add some like secrets? Like some secret tapes you can find to print stuff?
Bob

reviews.review_title: Doesn't work but I fixed it
reviews.review_description: I recently bought this game and it seemed great at first. I played the tutorial stage and the saved and quit. When I try to load the game up a second time it won't load, no matter what. I have tried uninstalling and reinstalling but nothing works. I drained the headset and recharged it and it works now

I've played for a bit and I have to say... the game looks amazing on Quest 3! 

I haven't made it too far but from the looks of it, once the game starts getting crazy, the amount of things to keep tabs on to keep the ship working seems like a lot of fun! 

The voice acting is pretty entertaining as well! I haven't played many VR games foe the story, but this one is up there so far in terms of making me care about the world!

As for the 4 out of 5 star review...

Only giving it 4 stars because the "hand tracking" wasn't as good as I thought it'd be for this kind of game. I find myself grabbing the disc cartridges and the hammer at random times. I even stored the cartridges in the drawer, and somehow, they end up in my hands when I'm not even grabbing.

Another minor issue when sitting down with hand tracking: its really hard to grab things right under you. Probably has to do because of the chair messing up the hand tracking. I'll go back to using controllers for now. Easy fix

reviews.review_title: Best space game on quest in my opinion
reviews.review_description: Been waiting for this game for so long and I can happily day I was not disappointed. I've encountered a few bugs off of launch but that's to be expected and nothing that is horrible and can't be learned from to fix
Its good but there are Some stuff that make it impossible to do but it is a good game tho so good job om making it

reviews.review_title: One of the best games I’ve ever played
reviews.review_description: The mechanics are fun and easy to learn the interactions are smooth and satisfying and also the visuals are pretty cool looking
Been waiting for ages only thing I could ask for is a sandbox mode
The game is fun and all but it gets repetitive I think a trading system would mix well but the game is a really nice game and I like it
10/10 amazing really polished fun puzzles and gameplay that doesn’t get repetitive also some of the moments are really funny

reviews.review_title: Absolutely Brilliant but I can't progres
reviews.review_description:
The game is absolutely great, the energy management is fun, Ziggy is charming and the controls are spot on, the tutorial gives you plenty of understanding of what to do, lots of compartments in the ship, you feel like a genuine pilot (there's not enough games like this on Quest)

However unfortunately, I can't progress after the tutorial because I'm coming up against invisible ships! I get to the point where I receive a distress call and I need to take out the ships but one is just invisible, it still fires at me, I tried firing a bomb at it but no joy. I did restart the level but the same thing happened. I don't know if completely restarting from a fresh save will fix the issue but hopefully it's something that can be fixed asap?

(developer response)
Yes it's the level where you receive the first distress call. The initial 4 enemies that appear with the white markings around them just one ship was invisible, yeah you still see engine trails and you can see projectiles being fired. Just no way to destroy the target. 

I went back to the Quest dashboard restarted the game and continued from the last save and it happened again. I will try restarting from the beginning tomorrow to see if it happens again, if it does I'll try and record it and send it to you, via Twitter.

developer_response.body:
Hey,

We believe have now fixed this issue, do give it a try and thanks for reporting this issue to us!

reviews.review_description: I played, but then it brought me to a credit section and it will not let me leave it

developer_response.body:
Hey,
This should be fixed in the latest update.
Try it out now!

reviews.review_description: This is the funnest game I have ever played! I like how it has so much adrenaline. Just a fun game overall.
